title: Icons & Shortcuts
subtitle: Identify Common Icons & Create Desktop Shortcuts
overview: This session helps students identify common desktop icons and learn how to create shortcuts on the desktop using real-life examples and hands-on computer activities.

images._note: Add screenshots of desktop icons, shortcut creation steps, and classroom computer activities.

gallery.caption: Desktop icons help open apps quickly
Recycle Bin stores deleted files temporarily
Browser icon used for internet access

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Screenshot of creating desktop shortcut
gallery.caption: Creating a desktop shortcut step-by-step

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Students practicing shortcuts in lab
gallery.caption: Students learning desktop shortcuts

keyTopics: Icons — Small pictures representing apps or files
Shortcut — Quick way to open programs
Desktop — Main screen of the computer
Folder Icon — Used to organize files
Right Click Menu — Used to create shortcuts
Double Click — Opens applications and folders

youtubeVideos.title: Desktop Icons and Shortcuts Explained
youtubeVideos.desc: Simple explanation of desktop icons and shortcuts.

youtubeVideos.title: How to Create Desktop Shortcut
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how to create shortcuts on Windows desktop.

activity.title: Create a Desktop Shortcut
steps: Find an application like Paint or Calculator

options: A small picture representing a file or app
quiz.explanation: Icons are small pictures used to represent programs, files, or folders.

options: A quick way to open a program
quiz.explanation: A shortcut helps users open applications quickly.

quiz.q: Which action is used to open an icon?
quiz.explanation: Double-clicking an icon opens the application or file.
Recycle Bin temporarily stores deleted files.

quiz.q: Which icon is commonly used for internet browsing?
quiz.explanation: Chrome is a web browser used to access the internet.

quiz.q: What does a Folder icon do?
quiz.explanation: Folders help organize and store files neatly.

quiz.q: Which mouse action helps create a shortcut?
quiz.explanation: Right-click opens options including shortcut creation.
Desktop is the most common place for shortcuts.

quiz.q: Which application is used for drawing?
quiz.explanation: Paint is used for simple drawing and coloring.

quiz.q: What happens when you delete a shortcut?
quiz.explanation: Deleting a shortcut removes only the shortcut, not the original app.
Desktop is the main screen workspace of a computer.

quiz.q: Which symbol usually appears on shortcut icons?
quiz.explanation: Shortcut icons usually show a small arrow mark.

quiz.q: Which device is mainly used to click icons?
quiz.explanation: Mouse is mainly used to click and open icons.

quiz.q: What does the Chrome icon represent?
quiz.explanation: Chrome is a web browser used for internet access.
Shortcuts save time by quickly opening applications.
